requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 61000-Series and IEC 62920 Evidence for PV Inverters in Namibia Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——纳米比亚项目中光伏逆变器的IEC 61000系列和IEC 62920证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——納米比亞項目中光伏逆變器的IEC 61000系列和IEC 62920證據

summary.en: Namibia PV inverter EMC acceptance should be built around the project specification, NSI-adopted standards where applicable, and the requirements of NamPower, the relevant RED, municipality, lender, or EPC. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series standards provide common immunity, emission, harmonic, and flicker test methods and limits. For grid-tied inverters, EMC is not only a product-label issue; it affects power quality, harmonics, protection coordination, and utility acceptance.
summary.zh: 纳米比亚光伏逆变器EMC验收应围绕项目规格、适用时NSI采纳的标准，以及NamPower、相关RED、市政、贷款方或EPC要求构建。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列标准则提供常见抗扰度、发射、谐波和闪变测试方法及限值。对于并网逆变器，EMC不仅是产品标签问题，还影响电能质量、谐波、保护配合及公用事业验收。
summary.zht: 納米比亞光伏逆變器EMC驗收應圍繞項目規格、適用時NSI採納的標準，以及NamPower、相關RED、市政、貸款方或EPC要求構建。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列標準則提供常見抗擾度、發射、諧波和閃變測試方法及限值。對於併網逆變器，EMC不僅是產品標籤問題，還影響電能品質、諧波、保護配合及公用事業驗收。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic current emissions and immunity requirements where applicable
NSI conformity expectations for Namibian standards adopting or referencing IEC standards

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence may be based on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and test reports issued by Chinese laboratories. These reports may use IEC 61000-family methods, but China-side certification does not automatically prove IEC 62920 compliance for a Namibia project or satisfy a NamPower, RED, lender, or EPC documentation checklist. The relevant report should match the exact model, rating, firmware, port configuration, and operating mode supplied.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据可能基于GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及中国实验室出具的测试报告。此类报告可能采用IEC 61000系列方法，但中国侧认证不会自动证明满足纳米比亚项目的IEC 62920合规，也不会自动满足NamPower、RED、贷款方或EPC文件清单。相关报告应匹配所供应的具体型号、功率等级、固件、端口配置及运行模式。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據可能基於GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及中國實驗室出具的測試報告。此類報告可能採用IEC 61000系列方法，但中國側認證不會自動證明滿足納米比亞項目的IEC 62920合規，也不會自動滿足NamPower、RED、貸款方或EPC文件清單。相關報告應匹配所供應的具體型號、功率等級、韌體、端口配置及運行模式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T or NB/T EMC reports are useful background evidence but should not be treated as a complete Namibia acceptance package. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports, verify laboratory accreditation and model coverage, and confirm with the connecting utility or EPC whether harmonics, flicker, immunity, and conducted/radiated emissions must be retested under Namibia 50 Hz 220/380 V operating settings.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T或NB/T EMC报告可作为背景证据，但不应视为完整的纳米比亚验收文件包。出口商应取得或映射IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，核验实验室认可及型号覆盖范围，并与接入公用事业单位或EPC确认谐波、闪变、抗扰度以及传导/辐射发射是否须在纳米比亚50 Hz 220/380 V运行参数下重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T或NB/T EMC報告可作為背景證據，但不應視為完整的納米比亞驗收文件包。出口商應取得或映射IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，核驗實驗室認可及型號覆蓋範圍，並與接入公用事業單位或EPC確認諧波、閃變、抗擾度以及傳導/輻射發射是否須在納米比亞50 Hz 220/380 V運行參數下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required for grid-tied inverter acceptance, utility power-quality review, and lender/EPC technical due diligence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven under China-side inverter certification and procurement practice; not transferable as Namibia approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China-only EMC certificate as Namibia project evidence. Map the file to IEC 62920 and the applicable IEC 61000-series tests, confirm model and firmware coverage, and ask NamPower, the relevant RED, municipality, EPC, or lender whether Namibia 50 Hz 220/380 V settings require additional power-quality or EMC testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅限中国的EMC证书作为纳米比亚项目证据。请将文件映射至IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列测试，确认型号和固件覆盖范围，并向NamPower、相关RED、市政、EPC或贷款方确认纳米比亚50 Hz 220/380 V参数是否需要额外电能质量或EMC测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅限中國的EMC證書作為納米比亞項目證據。請將文件映射至IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列測試，確認型號和韌體覆蓋範圍，並向NamPower、相關RED、市政、EPC或貸款方確認納米比亞50 Hz 220/380 V參數是否需要額外電能品質或EMC測試。
